events.title: Spring Photo Walk
events.description: Join us for a sunrise photo walk through the botanical gardens. All skill levels welcome — bring any camera you have.

events.title: Portrait Workshop
events.description: Learn the fundamentals of portrait photography including lighting, posing, and post-processing techniques.

events.title: Annual Exhibition
events.description: Our yearly showcase at the Downtown Gallery. Submit your best work and celebrate our community's talent.

events.title: Weekly Photo Meetup
events.description: Casual weekly gathering to share recent work, discuss techniques, and plan upcoming shoots. Open to all members.

events.title: Photo Critique Circle
events.description: Biweekly portfolio review and constructive critique session. Bring 3-5 of your best recent shots for group feedback.

events.title: Monthly Member Exhibition
events.description: Rotating exhibition featuring work from our members. Each month highlights a different theme chosen by the community.

events.title: Advanced Techniques Workshop
events.description: In-depth workshop covering advanced composition, long exposure, and experimental photography techniques. Led by guest instructors.
